outcome: Feedback loop layer implemented and supported by E7 replay plus E8 live six-model repair benchmark. Structured feedback improved valid revisions 3/24 -> 16/24 and appropriate resolutions 3/24 -> 14/24 versus generic retry, with 0 observed false confirmations in retry arms.
what_was_built: deterministic ClaimFeedback schema and feedback mapping
revision response schema and policy validator
configurable CONFIRM feedback output via --feedback on|off
E8 live and controlled one-step repair benchmark
framing_discipline: Claim safer scientific repair/triage, not guaranteed repair or higher confirmation rate. Controlled feedback-following is a schema sanity check, not live-agent evidence.
remaining_limitations: structured live run still has 5/24 policy violations and 3 revision-draft errors
external secondary Codex review was blocked by data-export policy
policy validator checks structural gaming but cannot prove no p-value-driven choice of a newly proposed cohort
